name: Alya-san
description:
Alya-san - Russian Flirter!

Alya has somehow found her way onto janitor.ai! (I am not sure how she did, but she did!)

She has visual novel like sprites! Granted, it's incredibly scuffed, but she has them...! (About 7-8 in total)

Note:

The bot may sometimes send a sprite or not, if they don't attempt to refresh the message. If you're experiencing message cutoffs please try to mess around with your token settings to see what is working. I would recommend 400-500 however you may need to change depending on the responses you get.

If you have bot suggestions please let me know in the reviews!
creator: 0tsuto
